channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Myanmar military restricts menstrual products amid civil war, exacerbating hardship for women
item.description: The military government in Myanmar has reportedly expanded restrictions on the transport of menstrual products across key routes as part of its ongoing civil war. This move appears to extend the Tatma...

item.title: Inside Peridot Bar: A Green Gem-Inspired Lounge in Hong Kong
item.description: Perched on the 38th floor of The Henderson in Hong Kong, Peridot Bar is a visually striking cocktail lounge designed by Studio Paolo Ferrari. Wrapped almost entirely in soft emerald plaster, the inter...

item.title: NGCP Lifts Red and Yellow Power Alerts as Supply Stabilizes in Luzon and Visayas
item.description: The National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP) announced on May 16, 2026, that red and yellow power alerts in Luzon and Visayas have been lifted. These alerts were initially raised due to the...

item.title: APC aspirant challenges conduct of Daura/Sandamu/Mai’adua constituency primaries
item.description: Auwalu Lawan Daura, wey be main challenger to Yusuf Buhari for All Progressives Congress (APC) ticket for Daura/Sandamu/Mai’adua Federal Constituency, don talk say e no happy with how dem run the prim...

item.title: Maldives diver dies during recovery mission for Italian cave diving accident
item.description: A Maldivian military diver tragically died while attempting to recover the bodies of four Italian divers who went missing in an underwater cave in Vaavu Atoll. The Italian divers, including a marine b...

item.title: How Trusts Are Used to Reduce Tax and Concentrate Wealth in Australia
item.description: Australia has over one million trusts, structures historically used for estate planning and asset protection, but increasingly exploited by wealthy individuals to reduce tax liabilities. Discretionary...

item.title: King's Troop Soldier Tragically Dies Following Fall at Royal Windsor Horse Show
item.description: A tragic incident occurred at the Royal Windsor Horse Show on Friday evening, when a member of the King's Troop, Royal Horse Artillery, died after falling from their horse. The accident took place at ...

item.title: Zanzibar Lawmakers Call for Better Curriculum and Facilities in New Multi-Storey Schools
item.description: Members of Zanzibar's House of Representatives have expressed concern that despite the government’s large investments in constructing modern multi-storey schools, the quality of education in these ins...

item.title: Rep. Mike Haridopolos Faces Direct Questions from Voters on C-SPAN About Trump and Economic Concerns
item.description: During a live C-SPAN broadcast, Republican Rep. Mike Haridopolos of Florida was confronted by frustrated voters raising concerns about President Donald Trump's policies and statements. One caller, an ...

item.title: Jameson Blake Shares His Journey as a Pisonaryo on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: Jameson Blake, the multi-talented Filipino actor and performer, opens up about his unique experience joining the popular game show “Kapamilya Deal or No Deal.” Known for his versatility in acting, sin...

item.title: CBS News Prepares Changes to '60 Minutes' Under Bari Weiss' Leadership
item.description: CBS News is facing internal uncertainty as editor-in-chief Bari Weiss plans to implement significant changes to the iconic news program '60 Minutes' in the upcoming season. Sources indicate that while...

item.title: Comprehensive Father’s Day Gift Guide for 2026
item.description: Father’s Day is fast approaching, and finding the perfect gift for the dad who claims he doesn’t need anything can be tricky. This guide from Global News provides a wide range of thoughtful gift optio...

item.title: Family of Late Police Officer George Makori Welcomes Any Children Confirmed to Be His
item.description: The family of the late George Makori, a well-respected police officer who served at Lodwar Police Station, has spoken out following rumours that he fathered multiple children before his passing. Accor...

item.title: Accountant Davron Chanderdeo Uses TikTok to Make Financial Literacy Accessible in South Africa
item.description: Davron Chanderdeo, a qualified chartered accountant, is making waves in South Africa by using TikTok to improve financial literacy. Starting his journey in Grade 11, Chanderdeo moved from science to c...

item.title: Sierra Leone agrees to receive West African migrants deported from the US under new agreement
item.description: Sierra Leone has confirmed that it will take in hundreds of West African migrants being deported by the United States, according to Foreign Minister Timothy Kabba. The first group, consisting of 25 in...

item.title: Meralco defeats Magnolia in overtime to secure semifinals spot in PBA
item.description: In a thrilling PBA Commissioner's Cup matchup, the Meralco Bolts managed to overcome the Magnolia Hotshots in overtime, securing their place in the semifinals. The game, which showcased intense compet...

item.title: Tech Sector Dominance Raises Valuation Concerns for Investors
item.description: The tech sector is currently experiencing extraordinary growth, reminiscent of the late 1990s dotcom boom, with stocks in the S&P 500 showing record-high valuations. After a robust earnings season, ma...

item.title: Federal Judge Condemns ICE for Targeted Arrest and Publicizing It Online
item.description: A federal judge has strongly criticized U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for orchestrating a highly publicized arrest of Christian Cerna, a 28-year-old carpenter from Boyle Heights, foll...

item.title: John Mbadi Responds to Winnie Odinga's Criticism, Emphasises Experience and Political Record
item.description: National Treasury CS John Mbadi has hit back at EALA legislator Winnie Odinga following her recent comments on his political conduct. Speaking at a funeral in Kisii, Winnie Odinga accused Mbadi of usi...

item.title: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew Addresses Potential Impact of Social Media and AI Ban on Classroom YouTube Use
item.description: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew has indicated that the province's upcoming ban on social media and AI chatbots for children will likely prohibit teachers from using YouTube in classrooms due to features li...
